compressed_prompt:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
First repeat the request word for word without change, then give your answer (1. do not say any words or characters before repeating the request; 2. the request you need to repeat does not include this sentence)
response:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.

<<Resignation Notice>>

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification of my resignation from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day, typically two weeks from the date of the email].

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunities you have provided me during my time here. I have greatly valued the experience and professional growth I have gained while working on the team.

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my remaining time. I am happy to assist with training a replacement or completing any necessary handover tasks.

Thank you again for your support and guidance. I wish you and the company all the best for the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
